description: Progressive verification of allTransactions.ts Wayback PDF links against the Wayback CDX API. Checks ~50/day serially (Internet Archive rate-limits concurrent requests from this environment).
note: This one entry is not a web.archive.org wayback URL at all (it is a direct dawlati/moim.gov.lb link) -- confirmed via direct HTTP check it now 404s. Excluded from REAL/FAKE wayback tally.
